title: Params for user.group_remove
description: Canonical parameters when invoking user.group_remove. Removing a user from a group is a per-group operation — there is no IAM-portable 'all privileged groups' selector. The orchestrator resolves the privileged-group set upstream and invokes this action once per group.

group_id.description: The vendor-side group identifier (Okta groupId, Azure AD object id, Google Workspace group key, AD distinguishedName).
